reasoning: The Dow Jones Industrial Average just underwent index-altering changes in Feb 2024 and Nov 2024, leaving the index fairly balanced and 'fresh' without any immediately troubled or unusually low-priced companies forcing an imminent drop. With no official announcements, credible rumors, or major catalysts (such as upcoming stock splits among the most heavily weighted components or M&A delistings among the constituents) on the horizon, the chance of an unprompted removal being announced in the ~2 months remaining until July 1, 2025 is very small. Following an absence of evidence pointing to any impending change, the odds are evaluated slightly below the historical base rate for a standard two-month window (which is around ~5%).
